note: Baseline from an interrupted cargo-mutants 27.1.0 run over the distill extractors (66 testable of 77 evaluated; 11 unviable excluded). floor is the ratchet: overall kill rate must not regress below it. distill/compiler.rs has since been raised to 1.0 (PR #9) — the per_file value below records the baseline snapshot at measurement time, not current main.
